title: Distant Banners
description: This mod for 1.12.2 renders banners as far as your render distance.
body:
**In Vanilla Minecraft banners will cull abruptly, now they're tied exactly to your render distance.**

![distance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6215e9964fd08ecf060749b170ee948c519ff995.png)

![zoom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e8bc90c2cc0423c26193bc0375f81ff1ca2377d.png)
